c74object.name: dk.fourses~
c74object.description: The dk.fourses~ objet is a digital recreation of the ciat-lonbarde Fourses module/synth. It is made up of four stacked triangle oscillators which bounce off each other which generate intricate but interrelated chaotic outputs. The control scheme is inspired by both the original Fourses hardware synth as well as the euro module sharing its name.
c74object.discussion: Based on the ciat-lonbarde Fourses. For more information visit https://www.ciat-lonbarde.net/ifm/ifmFRS.pdf

inlet.digest: Note input and optional audio input
inlet.description: Note input (as MIDI float) and optional audio input for triggering the algorithm.

outlet.description: Impulse that is fed to algorithm output.

outlet.digest: Dump out for parameter names, ranges, and values
outlet.description: Dump out for parameter names, ranges, and values.

method.name: dump
method.digest: Dump parameter names, ranges, and values
method.description: Dumps parameter names, ranges, and values out of the right-most outlet.

method.name: randomize
method.description: Randomize parameters defined by the preset dictionary. An additional optional argument will randomize by a certain percentage.

attribute.name: slopea
attribute.digest: Ratio of up to down slope of oscillator A
attribute.description: Ratio of up to down slope of oscillator A, with 0 being a symmetrical triangle (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: slopeb
attribute.digest: Ratio of up to down slope of oscillator B
attribute.description: Ratio of up to down slope of oscillator B, with 0 being a symmetrical triangle (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: slopec
attribute.digest: Ratio of up to down slope of oscillator C
attribute.description: Ratio of up to down slope of oscillator C, with 0 being a symmetrical triangle (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: sloped
attribute.digest: Ratio of up to down slope of oscillator D
attribute.description: Ratio of up to down slope of oscillator D, with 0 being a symmetrical triangle (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: ramptime
attribute.digest: Ramp time for smoothing of each parameter
attribute.description: Ramp time for smoothing each parameter (in ms).

attribute.name: ratea
attribute.description: Rate of oscillator A, ranging from sub-LFO to audio rate (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: rateb
attribute.description: Rate of oscillator B, ranging from sub-LFO to audio rate (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: ratec
attribute.description: Rate of oscillator C, ranging from sub-LFO to audio rate (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: rated
attribute.description: Rate of oscillator D, ranging from sub-LFO to audio rate (-1 to 1).

attribute.name: upsample
attribute.description: How much upsampling to apply to underlying algorithm (0 = none, 1 = default, 2 = maximum).
